features.loansText: Participants may borrow up to one-half of their account balance, a minimum of $1,000 and not to exceed $50,000, for a period not to exceed five years, except for notes used to acquire a principal residence for which terms up to 10 years may be granted.
features.autoEnrollText: The Plan provides for automatic enrollment on the date participants become eligible for the Plan.

features.vestingText: A participant is 100 percent vested after 5 years of credited service.
features.rothText: Contributions: Each year, participants may contribute up to 90 percent of eligible compensation, as either pre-tax or Roth contributions, as defined in the Plan.

features.vestingText: Vesting Participants are immediately 100% vested in their accounts attributable to participant elective contributions, rollovers, voluntary after-tax contributions, Company non-elective and matching contributions.
features.afterTaxText: Participants are also allowed to make voluntary, non-deductible, after-tax contributions and rollover contributions of amounts received from other tax-qualified retirement plans.
features.eligibilityText: There is no service requirement and eligible employees may enter the Plan on their date of hire.
features.autoEnrollText: Eligible employees who have not made an affirmative election to defer compensation to the Plan, including an election not to defer are automatically enrolled in the Plan at a pre-tax contribution rate of 6% of eligible compensation.

features.matchText: Company safe-harbor matching contributions are defined as 100% on the first 3% of a participant’s pre-tax and post-tax contributions and 50% of the next 2% of contributions as defined by the Plan document.
features.vestingText: Vesting Participants are immediately vested in their contributions, Company safe harbor matching contributions and rollover contributions plus actual earnings thereon.
features.rothText: Participants may designate contributions as Roth contributions.
features.loansText: Notes Receivable from Participants Participants may borrow from their Plan accounts a minimum of $1,000 up to a maximum equal to the lesser of $50,000 (reduced by the participant’s highest outstanding loan balance in the preceding 12 months) or 50% of their account balance.
features.autoEnrollText: Under automatic enrollment, 3% of the participant’s compensation before tax will be contributed to the Plan as pre-tax contributions.

features.match: 100% of the first 3% of pay + 50% of the next 2%
features.matchText: The safe harbor match is equal to 100% of the first 3% of eligible participant’s compensation plus 50% of the next 2% of the eligible participant’s compensation contributed to the Plan.
features.rothText: Participants may also contribute amounts representing distributions from other qualified defined benefit or defined contribution plans (rollovers) and Roth contributions.
features.necText: The Company made discretionary non-elective contributions of 2% of active participant’s eligible compensation during the years ended .
features.autoEscalateText: Automatic increases of 1%, up to 9%, will occur each year on a specific date, as defined.
features.eligibilityText: Under the terms of the Plan, employees who are age 18 or older are eligible to participate in the Plan on their date of hire.
